name: rung_438_frontier_multibind_query_pressure
utterances: Use parent/2, ancestor/2, lives_in/2, inside/2, in_region/2, carries/2.
Set parent(ian, scott). Set parent(scott, dana). Set parent(scott, pierce).
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- lives_in(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).

utterances.utterance: they both live in salem, but pierce got moved to bend after
clarification_answers: Set lives_in(dana, salem). Set lives_in(pierce, salem). Retract lives_in(pierce, salem). Set lives_in(pierce, bend).

utterances: Set inside(salem, oregon). Set inside(bend, oregon).
